headline: Is Dover (DOV) Still Attractive After A 32% One-Year Share Price Climb?
summary: If you are wondering whether Dover at around US$216.69 still offers value, the key question is how its current price lines up with what the underlying business may be worth. The stock has returned 4.5% over the last week, 2.7% over the past month, 10.7% year to date, and 32.1% over the last year, which naturally raises questions about how much of the story is already priced in. Recent coverage has focused on Dover as a large U.S. industrial name that is often used as a reference point for...
